description_full:
📍 Remote (Global) | 🕐 Posted 1 hour ago - April 26, 2026 | 🧑‍💻 Internship

Tradebit is hiring motivated interns to join their high dynamical team. They are looking for a Web3 Community & Ecosystem Growth Intern and a Blockchain Consulting & Research Intern.

📋 Responsibilities include:
- Community & Ecosystem Growth: Help manage talent networks, build global partnerships, and drive Web3 community initiatives.
- Blockchain Consulting & Research: Analyze emerging trends like DePIN and RWA, provide expert insights, and support blockchain-related projects.

📩 To apply: Send your portfolio and CV to hellotradebit@gmail.com

🔗 Original post: https://www.linkedin.com/posts/were-hiring-interns-to-bridge-the-trust-share-7453798501227937792-jQjn
